{{Help|beta}}
[[File:Child of light.png|thumb|right|x200px|A Child of Light]] '''Children of Light''' are glowing characters scattered throught the [[Realms]], which grant the player [[Winged Light]] upon collection. They look like capeless Sky Kids, which are bright white with a golden glow, and are highlighted by a light halo, which makes them easy to see from afar. For each Child of Light, a [[Winged Light]] can be collected, by selecting their {{Icon|Hand-with-star-icon.png|link=|label=hand with a star|Inline_text}} icon when close to them. Although TGC has referred to them as "Imprints of the Children of Light,"TGC's [https://youtu.be/f0XBmzddf40?t=269 Welcome To Sky: A Traveler's Guide] video at 4:29 they are most commonly just called "Children of Light". While a few Children of Light can be found easily, many are hard to spot. Some are visible, but in a location that the player initially cannot reach. More experienced players can help others collecting Children of Light, though players can return to collect the harder-to-find ones after progressing further in the game. Below are the locations of all Children of Light currently found in the game. ==Summary== [[File:Winged_Light_Distribution.jpg|thumb|x300px|Winged Light Distribution by Clement (outdated)]] This is a summary of all the Children of Light by Realm. {| class="article-table" ! Total in Realms ! {{#expr:{{Game Stat|wings_std}}+{{Game Stat|wings_orbit}}}} ! |} ''*Available at the end of the Trials in Cave of Prophecies, each Trial consists of one Winged Light.'' ==[[Aviary Village]] ({{#var:aviary}})== ===Wandering Carnival ({{#var:wandering_carnival}})=== The Wandering Carnival is accessed via the boat docked to the left of the Realm Gates and before the exit to the Wind Paths.
Carnival-Winged-Light-1.jpg Carnival-Winged-Light-2.jpg *'''Aviary WL 1''': One on the prow of the small boat with the carousel. *'''Aviary WL 2''': One in a hidden room behind a bookshelf that opens when activated by a lantern; this can be found at the back of the bottommost deck.
==[[Isle of Dawn]] ({{#var:isle}})== ===Passage Rock ({{#var:passage_rock}})=== Isle of Dawn is the first Realm the player comes to. IMG_5815.JPG|Isle WL 1 (Far) IMG_5816.JPG|Isle WL 1 StarIsle1.jpg|Isle WL 2 (Far) StarIsle01.jpg|Isle WL 2 *'''Isle WL 1''': Enter the first cave and walk to the end. Fly or jump down to the stranded boat below where the Child of Light stands on. ''(Note that first-time players will see this Child of Light at the jump-off point behind the Temple instead. After being collected and lost for the first time, it can be found at the usual location).'' *'''Isle WL 2''': Go to the right of the first cave to climb above the mouth of the cave (or fly up the mountain behind from Isle WL 1 spot). Walk across the top of the hill to find the Child of Light at the other end. ===Dawn Circle ({{#var:dawn_circle}})=== StarIsle4.jpg|Isle WL 3 (Far) StarIsle04.jpg|Isle WL 3 StarIsle3.jpg|Isle WL 4 (Far) StarIsle03.jpg|Isle WL 4 Migration-WingedLight-in-Isle.png|Isle WL 10 (Far) *'''Isle WL 3''': Go straight ahead to the ramp further away, in front of the Temple. The Child of Light is at the top of the ramp. It is required to find at least one Ancestor Spirit from Isle of Dawn to enter the ramp or be able to fly to the top of it ''(it's less walking if Isle WL 4 is collected before Isle WL 3).'' See the [[Isle of Dawn]] page on information where to find the Spirits or go towards the caves on the left of the ramp to find [[Pointing Candlemaker]] at the entrance. *'''Isle WL 4''': Go to the very right of the area, behind the big ramp to the right, there is a cave with butterflies above where The Child of Light can be found inside. At least one Ancestor Spirit from Isle of Dawn needs to be found in order to enter the cave. *'''Isle WL 10''': Towards the left, behind the big cave at the beginning, behind the Migration Camp. ===Dawn Overlook ({{#var:dawn_overlook}})=== IMG_5817.JPG|Isle WL 5 - Through the cloud tunnel IMG_5447.JPG|Isle WL 5 - Tunnel entrance IMG_5445.JPG|Isle WL 5 *'''Isle WL 5''': Use the cloud tunnel on the right side of the Temple to reach the mountain structure. There is a two player door blocking the main entrance to the cave, either open the door and process to fly up the locked gate door that can be open by light up 2 lanterns nearby in the middle, or fly up to the upper level outside (fly near the clouds to recharge cape energy), and reach the Child of Light through the tunnel. It's in a little cave offshoot on the right. (To the right of the gated hole). ===Cave of Prophecies ({{#var:cave_of_prophecies}})=== The Cave of Prophecies can be accessed from an opening in the cloud wall between the Dawn Temple and the Dawn Overlook, and the entrance is blocked with a Spirit Gate that requires at least two Spirits from the Hidden Forest to be found. This area can be also accessed via the [[Wind Paths]] through the first cloud tunnel. Due to the addition of the Cave of Prophecies and the Trials during the [[Season of Prophecy]], players will receive one Winged Light for each trial they complete. As there are four Trials, there are four Children of Light. Each child appears at the end of each trial. The exit circle will not appear unless the Winged Light is collected or has already been claimed.
Cave of Prophecies Entry Area.jpg|The tunnel entrance to the Cave of Prophecies (Isle WL 6, 7, 8, and 9) Trial of water entrance.jpg|Entrance to the Trial of Water (Isle WL 6) Beginning of water trial.jpg|Trial of Water (Isle WL 6) WL water trial.jpg|Isle WL 6 Entrance to the trial of earth.jpg|Entrance to the Trial of Earth (Isle WL 7) Inside the earth trial.jpg|Trial of Earth (Isle WL 7) Trial of Earth WL.jpg|Isle WL 7 AIR TRIAL.JPG|Entrance to the Trial of Air (Isle WL 8) SoPtAir.jpg|Trial of Air (Isle WL 8) AIR WL.JPG|Isle WL 8 Trial of Fire Entrance.jpg|Entrance to the Trial of Fire (Isle WL 9) Trial-of-Fire-Inside-WL.png|Trial of Fire (Isle WL 9) Trial-of-Fire-WL.png|Isle WL 9 *'''Isle WL 6''': This Winged Light can be collected upon completing Trial of Water. The Child of Light stands on top of the glowing mountain at the end of the Trial. *'''Isle WL 7''': This Winged Light can be collected upon completing Trial of Earth. Complete the maze-like puzzle and get to the shining tower in middle at the end of the Trial where The Child of Light stands in. *'''Isle WL 8''': This Winged Light can be collected upon completing Trial of Air. Climb the towering islands to reach the main island at the top, where the Child of Light stands. *'''Isle WL 9''': This Winged Light can be collected upon completing Trial of Fire. The Child of Light stands behind the final checkpoint, past all the [[Dark Shadows]].
==[[Daylight Prairie]] ({{#var:prairie}})== ===Prairie Rest ({{#var:prairie_rest}})=== The Prairie Rest is the first area the player will land on when entering to Daylight Prairie. butterflyfieldsstar3far.jpg| Prairie WL 1 *'''Prairie WL 1''': The Child of Light is standing at the stone archway near the jump off point in the Prairie Rest, before the cloud tunnel that leads to Butterfly Fields proper. ''(Previously, this Child of Light stood by the entrance to Bird Nest before being moved near the entrance to the Prairie Village).'' ===Butterfly Fields ({{#var:butterfly_fields}})=== Butterfly Fields can be seen from the Prairie Rest area, behind the cloud tunnel that connects to both areas. StarPrairie1.jpg|Prairie WL 2 (Far) StarPrairie01.jpeg|Prairie WL 2 StarPrairie2.jpg|Prairie WL 3 (Far) StarPrairie02.jpg|Prairie WL 3 *'''Prairie WL 2''': The Child of Light is in the first cave to the left. At least one Ancestor Spirit in Daylight Prairie needs to be found on order to enter the cave. See the [[Daylight Prairie]] page on information where to find them or go towards to the big rock and find [[Butterfly Charmer]] at the small door. *'''Prairie WL 3''': The Child of Light is on top of the round cave rock. The easiest way to get there is to go inside the the cave and release a call (Long press on the avatar). Butterflies will gather around and offer a lift to the dome's ceiling. ===Prairie Village ({{#var:prairie_village}})=== Prairie Village is the area with 4 islands with 3 bell towers found after leaving the Butterfly Fields through the archway straight ahead. StarPrairie6.jpg|Prairie WL 4 (Far) StarPrairie06.jpg|Prairie WL 4 StarPrairie7.jpg|Prairie WL 5 (Door) - Requires 2 players StarPrairie07.jpg|Prairie WL 5 - Requires 2 players StarPrairie8.jpg|Prairie WL 6 (Far) StarPrairie08.jpg|Prairie WL 6 *'''Prairie WL 4''': A Child of Light stands in the center of the smaller front island in the middle. *'''Prairie WL 5''': Fly to the island to the left. Walk around to the right at the bottom of the hill to find a two player door. Both players need to hold a candle to the door to open it and reveal the Child of Light in the cave behind it. If there is no other player available, try leaving and entering the area to see if other players have appeared. If they are not near the door, release series of calls by tapping on the avatar to call them over. *'''Prairie WL 6''': Fly to the middle of the three bigger islands and walk around the back of the hill to find a Child of Light. ===Prairie Heights ({{#var:prairie_heights}})=== The Prairie Heights area is accessed through a Spirit Gate inside the right island of the Prairie Village area. An 8-Player Puzzle needs to be completed in order to enter this area. 8playerpuzzlestarfar.jpg|Far view of the cave 8playerpuzzlestar.JPG|Prairie WL 7 *'''Prairie WL 7''': The Child of Light here is in a windowed cave. Fly up to enter through the round window, or through a hole on the upper-back side. The Child of Light is standing on a raised tarp in the corner. (''This Child of Light was relocated after the area got a revamp for [[Days of Color]]. Previously, it was found inside a tree hollow.'') ===Temple of the Prairie ({{#var:prairie_temple}})=== The Temple of the Prairie can be reached from the Prairie Village area via three ways: riding a [[Manta]] after activating the three bells, flying up the clouds, or exiting the Prairie Heights area. StarPrairie11.jpg|Prairie WL 8 (Far) StarPrairie011.jpg|Prairie WL 8 StarPrairie12.jpg|Prairie WL 9 (Far) StarPrairie012.jpg|Prairie WL 9 *'''Prairie WL 8''': Fly onto the roof just above the door. The Child of Light is to the left. *'''Prairie WL 9''': From Prairie WL 8, fly higher up the roof. There is another Child of Light on the front dome (utilize the clouds to recharge cape energy). ===Prairie Cave ({{#var:prairie_cave}})=== There are two ways of reaching the Prairie Cave area, but both require the player to have found two Ancestor Spirits from [[Isle of Dawn]] and three from [[Daylight Prairie]] to enter. One entrance is high up on a ledge on the left side of Butterfly Fields, the other one is a cave entrance to the left side of the Prairie Village area, just above the left hand island. To collect the Winged Light, it is best to enter from Butterfly Fields. StarPrairie9.jpg|Prairie WL 10 (Far) StarPrairie09.jpg|Prairie WL 10 StarPrairie10.jpg|Prairie WL 11 (Far) StarPrairie010.jpg|Prairie WL 11 *'''Prairie WL 10''': Coming from Butterfly Fields, enter the cave with a split lake in the middle. On the left wall, there's a small cave high up. Going up the grassy stairs on the right until will lead to a lookout ledge with a view into the cave, and from there, the Child of Light can be seen standing in the cave. Fly over to reach it. *'''Prairie WL 11''': Opposite the entrance coming from Butterfly Fields, across the lake there is a narrower cave area high up from the ground on the right wall. The Child of Light stands in the small cave. Ideally use the previous spot to glide if not enough charge. ===Bird Nest ({{#var:bird_nest}})=== In order to enter the Bird Nest area at least four Ancestor Spirits in Daylight Prairie need to be found. See the realm page [[Daylight Prairie]] on how to find them. Birds Nest WL 12 (Far).jpg|Prairie WL 12 (Far) StarPrairie4.jpg|Prairie WL 12 Birds Nest WL 13 (Far).jpg|Prairie WL 13 (Far) StarPrairie5.jpg|Prairie WL 13 *'''Prairie WL 12''': The Child of Light is located on a higher island on the perimeter of the area, between the Villages gateway and the Sanctuary Islands entrance. *'''Prairie WL 13''': The Child of Light is on a small island directly below the gateway between Bird Nest and Villages. ===Sanctuary Islands ({{#var:sanctuary_islands}})=== This area is accessed through the hole in the clouds in Bird Nest, or via the second cloud tunnel in the [[Wind Paths]]. Two Children of Light are located on floating islands (#14 & #16), two Children of Light are on the outside of the main island and easily visible (#17 & #18), the other four are located within the main island's cave structure.
Prairie sanctuary WL1.jpeg|Prairie WL 14 Prairie sanctuary WL2.jpeg|Prairie WL 15 Prairie sanctuary WL3.jpeg|Prairie WL 16 Prairie sanctuary WL4.jpeg|Prairie WL 17 Prairie sanctuary WL5.jpeg|Prairie WL 18 Prairie sanctuary WL6.jpeg|Prairie WL 19 Prairie sanctuary WL7.jpeg|Prairie WL 20 Prairie sanctuary WL8.jpeg|Prairie WL 21 *'''Prairie WL 14''': The Child of Light is on the bottom shelf of the large floating island, underneath the small waterfall. *'''Prairie WL 15''': The Child of Light is at the bottom of the two-tiered waterfall at the island in middle of Sanctuary islands. *'''Prairie WL 16''': Fly towards the group of three floating islands furthest from the Bird Nest gateway. The Child of Light is on the floating island above a geyser. *'''Prairie WL 17''': The Child of Light is on a low ledge of the cliff between a big geyser on the beach, [[Season of Sanctuary]] Quests and the three whale tail statues. *'''Prairie WL 18''': The Child of Light is at the end of the tunnel at the top of the mountain. *'''Prairie WL 19''': Enter the cave system to the right of Prairie WL 15. Enter the room with the Darkness tree. The Child of Light is at the top of the spiral slope. *'''Prairie WL 20''': The Child of Light is inside the Jellyfish cave near the big geyser or by entering the right tunnel, to the left of the bottom of top waterfall. The cave has an opening along the beach near Prairie WL 17. *'''Prairie WL 21''': Enter the cave system to the left of Prairie WL 15. The Child of Light is up above on a high ledge, at the end of the second horizontal ladder.
===Prairie Peaks ({{#var:prairie_peaks}})=== The Prairie Peaks is accessed via a boat in the Prairie Cave from the Butterfly Field side.
Prairie-Peaks-WL1.jpg|Prairie WL 22 Prairie-Peaks-WL3.jpg|Prairie WL 23 Prairie-Peaks-WL2.jpg|Prairie WL 24 * '''Prairie WL 22''': The Child of Light is in [[Jolly Geologist]]'s cave (on the right side of Prairie Peaks), next to the large crystal structure. * '''Prairie WL 23''': The Child of Light is at the peak of the highest mountain, at the far end of Prairie Peaks. * '''Prairie WL 24''': The Child of Light is in the sub-area with the [[Nightbird Whisperer]] (on the left side of Prairie Peaks), at the very top of the bird-filled hollow cave.
==[[Hidden Forest]] ({{#var:forest}})== ===Forest Courtyard ({{#var:forest_courtyard}})=== StarForest1.jpg|Forest WL 1 (Far) StarForest01.jpg|Forest WL 1 StarForest2.jpg|Forest WL 2 (Far) StarForest02.jpg|Forest WL 2 *'''Forest WL 1''': The Child of Light can be caught seeing when flying down into the Forest from the Forest Rest. It is on a platform in the trees on the right, above the stone gate (utilize the clouds to recharge cape energy, need some practice to land). *'''Forest WL 2''': The Child of Light is standing in front of the gate to the Forest Brook at the end of Forest Courtyard. ===Forest Brook ({{#var:forest_brook}})=== This is the area with stone gazebos and a river through the middle. StarForest3.jpg|Forest WL 3 (Far) StarForest03.jpeg|Forest WL 3 StarForest4.jpeg|Forest WL 4 (Far) StarForest04.jpeg|Forest WL 4 StarForest5.jpg|Forest WL 5 (Far) StarForest05.jpg|Forest WL 5 StarForest6.jpeg|Forest WL 6 (Far) StarForest06.jpeg|Forest WL 6 *'''Forest WL 3''': Go to the first gazebo ahead. The tree to the right of it has glowing [[Flora,_Minerals_and_Elements_of_Sky#Light_Bloom | Light Blooms]] growing on it. Use them as a ladder to reach a treehouse platform with a Child of Light in it. *'''Forest WL 4''': From the Forest WL 3 location, look to the left; the Child of Light will be visibly standing on a platform on a tree. fly towards it or use the Light Blooms on the tree nearby to reach it. *'''Forest WL 5''': From the first gazebo, to the left, go to the next gazebo behind the hill of [[The Treehouse]] door, where [[Blushing Prospector]] can be found. There's a cave nearby on the wall in the hillside blocked by a [[Darkness Plant]] at front, pointed by the ramp (Sightly longer than other with no path on it). Clear the Darkness to find the Child of Light. *'''Forest WL 6''': Follow the course of the river to the end of Forest Brook, The Child of Light standing right before the exit to the next area. ===Boneyard ({{#var:boneyard}})=== To reach the Boneyard area, cross the Forest Brook and follow the course of the river to a split in the rocks. This area has a large tunnel/pipe at the beginning and a large lake with a broken bridge at its end. StarForest10.jpg|Forest WL 7 - Big Tree Entrance StarForest0010.jpg|Forest WL 7 - Big Tree Entrance StarForest010.jpg|Forest WL 7 StarForest9.jpg|Forest WL 8 (Far) StarForest09.jpg|Forest WL 8 StarForest11.jpg|Forest WL 9 (Far) StarForest011.jpg|Forest WL 9 *'''Forest WL 7''': Fly on top of the first big pipe at the beginning of the area. From the middle of the pipe on the right a hollow tree can be found with the Child of Light inside it. *'''Forest WL 8''': Go to the stump on the left, other way of the first big pipe. A tall tower with two floors can be seen far away. At least 4 Ancestor Spirits from the Forest need to be found to enter, but this Child of Light can also be collected from outside the Spirit Gate. *'''Forest WL 9''': Continue the main course. At the stilted temples with golden spires standing in the water, light the buttons in each of these to raise the bridge or fly to the last one that will have The Child of Light in it. ===Elevated Clearing ({{#var:elevated_clearing}})=== To reach the Elevated Clearing, go to the right of the first gazebo in the Forest Brook area or through a gate under the roots of a large tree on the right to the large lake in the Boneyard. Both entrances require the player to have found all eight Ancestor Spirits in the Hidden Forest. StarForest7.jpg|Forest WL 10 (Far) StarForest07.jpg|Forest WL 10 StarForest8.jpg|Forest WL 11 (Far) StarForest08.jpg|Forest WL 11 *'''Forest WL 10''': Go through the first gazebo, cross the lake and the Child of Light is on the platform on the left. *'''Forest WL 11''': The hollow tree on the right of the lake has a platform around it. Fly up, cross the rope bridge and find a Child of Light at the end of the platform. ===Blue Bird Theater ({{#var:blue_bird_theater}})=== A Seasonal Area for the [[Season of the Blue Bird]] accessible via a meditation circle located in the Elevated Clearing.
Blue-Bird-Winged-Light-Location.jpg|Forest WL 12 *'''Forest WL 12''': Found between the Map Shrine and Return Shrine across from the stage; turn around after entering the area.
===Forest Cavern ({{#var:forest_cavern}})=== An area of the Hidden Forest accessible from the Elevated Clearing or the Wind Paths. The Elevated Clearing entrance requires two players to enter, but all the Children of Light in this area can be collected without assistance from other players.
Foreststar9far.JPG|Forest WL 13 (Far) Caverns star1.jpg|Forest WL 13 Foreststar10far.JPG|Forest WL 14 (Far) Caverns star3.jpg|Forest WL 14 Foreststar11far.jpg|Forest WL 15 (Far) Caverns star2.jpg|Forest WL 15 Underground Cavern WL 15 (Far).jpg|Forest WL 16 (Far) Caverns star4.jpg|Forest WL 16 *'''Forest WL 13''': From the entrance, this is the second cave to the left, after the cave where Forest WL 14 is found. The first Child of Light is located high up in this cave above plenty butterfly jars. As with the entrance to the Forest Cavern, this Child of Light can be accessed after burning the lid on the large butterfly jar hidden behind a [[Darkness Plant]] at the back of the cave, then release a [[Deep Call]] to receive a lift from the released Butterflies; the Child of Light is not reachable otherwise. *'''Forest WL 14''': This Child of Light is located in a gated area to the bottom right of the entrance. *'''Forest WL 15''': To the left of the entrance, the exit to the Wind Paths is located - recognized by the birds streaming from this area down into the Forest Cavern. At the very top there is a gated structure, which so far leads nowhere. There is a Child of Light standing on a pillar in front of it. For new players and those low on flight energy it can be quite hard to reach, though it may help to start from a glowing [[Flora,_Minerals_and_Elements_of_Sky#Light_Bloom | Light Bloom]] across from the opening. Additionally, the birds streaming down will recharge the cape's energy. *'''Forest WL 16''': The Child of Light stands by the Forest Cavern exit, which is accessible at the top of the large hollow structure. Utilize the streams of Birds to recharge the cape's energy in order to fly up the structure.
===Sacred Pond ({{#var:sacred_pond}})=== StarForest12.jpg|Forest WL 17 StarForest012.jpg|Forest WL 17 *'''Forest WL 17''': After watching the cutscene in the Temple, the gates will open and lead to the Sacred Pond, a dry and sunny area of the forest ending with a pond. On the left of the gates exit, the Child of Light will be seen standing on top of a tree stump. ===The Treehouse ({{#var:treehouse}})===
Treehouse WL 17 (Entrance).jpg|Entrance to Forest WL 18 SOA-Winglight-2.jpg|Forest WL 18 Treehouse WL 18 (Far).jpg|Forest WL 19 (Far) SOA-Winglight-1.jpg|Forest WL 19 *'''Forest WL 18''': This Child of Light is found in the basement of the Assembly Treehouse. It can be accessed from within the Assembly Treehouse's main floor through a dark tunnel to the right of the staircase. *'''Forest WL 19''': When entering the Assembly Treehouse area, go to the right and look up. The Child of Light will be high up in a hole in the trunk of a tree.
===The Wind Paths ({{#var:wind_paths}})===
SOF-Winglight-1.png|Forest WL 20 (Auto-collection) SOF-Winglight-2.png|Forest WL 20 (Auto-collection) Migration-WingedLight-in-Windpath.png|Forest WL 21 (Far) *'''Forest WL 20''': This Child of Light is located in a tunnel just to the left of the Flight Guide in The Wind Paths. Strong winds prevent players from getting near and in order to capture it, players must enter the entrance tunnel on the farthest right, located under the main island. the tunnel will pull the player in upon successful entry. *'''Forest WL 21''': On the back side of the main island, on a ledge near the very top, under the gate.
==[[Valley of Triumph]] ({{#var:valley}})== To collect every Winged Light, players need to play the level twice as there are two different ways to the bottom. Note: ''On a Winged Light run, slide down the Lower Valley Race until the Child of Light is collected, teleport Home, then meditate to return to Valley. Then back out of the Lower Valley Race room and return to the Frozen Lake, and head to the Citadel and Upper Valley Race.'' ===Valley Rest ({{#var:valley_rest}})=== At the exit from the Valley Rest area, a large slope will stretch down and offer several sliding paths. StarValley1.jpg|Valley WL 1 (Auto-collection) StarValley01.jpg|Valley WL 1 (Auto-collection) *'''Valley WL 1''': As soon as the slide starts, aim for the roofed area on the left. The Child of Light is standing in the tunnel. Unlike Children of Light in other realms, this one will be collected automatically by sliding through or near it. ===Frozen Lake ({{#var:frozen_lake}})=== Taking any path on the large slope from the Valley Rest will lead to the Frozen Lake area. StarValley2.jpg|Valley WL 2 StarValley02.jpg|Valley WL 2 StarValley3.jpg|Valley WL 3 - Under ice StarValley03.jpg|Valley WL 3 - Under ice *'''Valley WL 2''': The Child of Light is standing on the platform in the middle of the Frozen Lake. *'''Valley WL 3''': Slide into one of the frozen-over holes in the ice to get beneath the rink. The Child of Light is standing on a hill by a sunken boat, near where the light shines in from above. ===Lower Valley Track ({{#var:lower_valley_track}})=== Through the Frozen Lake, take the exit with the red banners that doesn't have a bridge connected to it. This exit leads to the Lower Valley Track. StarValley9.jpeg|Valley WL 4 (Auto-collection) StarValley09.jpg|Valley WL 4 (Auto-collection) *'''Valley WL 4''': The Child of Light is located near the end of the first section of the track, standing in the center on a snowy ramp. Like the Child of Light during the slide from the Valley Rest, it is auto-collected by sliding through or near it. === The Citadel ({{#var:the_citadel}})=== The Citadel can be reached through the Spirit Gate to the left of the Frozen Lake that is connected to the platform by a bridge. The player is required to have found two Ancestor Spirits in the Valley of Triumph to enter. StarValley4.jpg|Valley WL 5 StarValley04.jpg|Valley WL 5 StarValley5.jpeg|Valley WL 6 (Auto-collection) StarValley05.jpeg|Valley WL 6 (Auto-collection) *'''Valley WL 5''': Fly to the highest tower on the left, behind the golden rings. The Child of Light is standing in the leftmost tower. *'''Valley WL 6''': From Valley WL 5's location, cross the bridge to the other high tower on the right. Jump out of the window facing away from the golden rings and descend. on the wall of the tower there are four alcoves, and the Child of Light is standing in the lowest one. This Child of light is auto-collected upon contact. ===Upper Valley Track ({{#var:upper_valley_track}})=== To get to the Upper Valley Track, leave the Citadel through the building at the back of the area. StarValley6.jpeg|Valley WL 7 (Auto-collection) StarValley06.jpg|Valley WL 7 (Auto-collection) StarValley07.jpeg|Valley WL 8 (Auto-collection) StarValley7.jpeg|Valley WL 8 (Auto-collection) *'''Valley WL 7''': Behind the bridge past the cloud tunnel, fly through the right hand gallery of the building to automatically pick up the Child of Light. *'''Valley WL 8''': Later on in the track there is an area obscured by floating rocks and debris. Keep to the right, the Child of Light is standing on top of a golden spire on a floating temple. ===The Coliseum ({{#var:the_coliseum}})=== Both the Lower and Upper Valley Tracks end in the same home stretch and the Coliseum area. StarValley8.jpeg|Valley WL 9 (Auto-collection) StarValley08.jpg|Valley WL 9 (Auto-collection) Screenshot 20201223-184359 Sky.jpg|Valley WL 10 Entrance to WL 11 hidden room.jpg|Entrance to Valley WL 11 Temple WL 11.jpg|Valley WL 11 *'''Valley WL 9''': Just before entering the Coliseum, the Child of Light is standing in the middle of the path. This Child of Light is auto-collected on contact. *'''Valley WL 10''': In the Coliseum, fly to the top of the big golden statue's shoulder on the left side of the Temple entrance. *'''Valley WL 11''': Inside the Coliseum Temple, there are two entrances to the Coliseum Maze on the left wall. The upper entrance will lead to a large room where the Child of Light is found standing at the base of a ladder on the left side. ===Village of Dreams ({{#var:village_of_dreams}})===
WL 12 Mountain.jpeg|Mountain to Valley WL 12 Cave Leading to WL 12.jpg|Cave Leading to Valley WL 12 SKY 20210105 115647 .jpg|Valley WL 12 WL 13 from Below.jpg|Cave Leading to Valley WL 13 Valley Wl 13.jpg|Valley WL 13 WL 14.jpg|Valley WL 14 *'''Valley WL 12''': When sliding down the entrance to the village via the Valley Rest, a large mountain can be seen ahead. Around the middle of the mountain, there is a Child of Light in a small cave. *'''Valley WL 13''': The Child of Light is in a small opening in the mountain near the village where the Bearhug Hermit's spirit quest travels. Look up the ski slope toward Valley WL 14. To the left of the main slope, head up the staircase in the rock, then fly to the left. The Child of Light is in a small cave. *'''Valley WL 14''': By going up the ski slopes that are closer to the Hermit's Valley, there is a Child of Light standing on the very top of a building.
===Hermit Valley ({{#var:hermit_valley}})===
WingLight4.jpg|Valley WL 15 WingLight5.jpg|Cave Leading to Valley WL 16 Hermit Valley WL 16.jpg|Valley WL 16 *'''Valley WL 15''': The Child of Light is located behind the Hermit's cave, on a window sill. *'''Valley WL 16''': Turn around and return to where you docked the ski lift ride. Looking down into the Valley, fly alongside the mountain on the right. The Child of Light is inside a cave in the side of the mountain.
===Village Theater ({{#var:village_theater}})===
Village Theater WL 17 (Entrance).jpg|Entrance to Valley WL 17 Season of Performance - WingedLight.png|Valley WL 17 *'''Valley WL 17''': The Child of Light is in a cave beside the stage in the back area, hidden by some stacked boxes.
==[[Golden Wasteland]] ({{#var:wasteland}})== ===The Outer Bailey ({{#var:outer_bailey}})=== StarWasteland1.jpg|Wasteland WL 1 StarWasteland01.jpg|Wasteland WL 1 StarWasteland2.jpg|Wasteland WL 2 StarWasteland02.jpg|Wasteland WL 2 *'''Wasteland WL 1''': The Child of Light is standing on a strip of land reaching into the lake in front of the fortress. *'''Wasteland WL 2''': Above the point where you entered the Realm there are some broken columns connected by a stone slab. The Child of Light is standing on top of it. It is hard to reach when playing alone, though the surrounding terrain can be used to gain a higher starting point. For instance, the mound of sand to the direct left of the landing area can be used to access the stone monument to the left of the Child of Light. From there, the player needs approximately 1-2 flaps to reach the next monument (with the Child of Light). Use the sparkle left behind by Wasteland WL 1 to recharge cape energy if needed. Another relatively simple way of reaching this WL if you have at least 8 wings, with no outside assistance. Starting from the top of the ruined building by the gates to Graveyard - fly horizontally to the middle of the arch with the WL on it, maintaining height with conservative flaps. ===The Graveyard ({{#var:the_graveyard}})=== Enter the Fortress. Be cautious when proceeding in these areas. There is one Dark Dragon in the Graveyard Entrance area and four in the Graveyard that can attack the player and make them lose Winged Light (see [[Creatures]] page for details). To get to the Graveyard, slide down the hill. Going into the pipe to the right will lead to the Crab Fields area. StarWasteland3Right.jpg|Wasteland WL 3 StarWasteland03.jpg|Wasteland WL 3 StarWasteland4.jpg|Wasteland WL 4 StarWasteland04.jpg|Wasteland WL 4 StarWasteland05.jpg|Wasteland WL 5 StarWasteland5.jpg|Wasteland WL 5 StarWasteland6.jpeg|Wasteland WL 6 StarWasteland06.jpg|Wasteland WL 6 StarWasteland7.jpeg|Wasteland WL 7 StarWasteland07.jpg|Wasteland WL 7 StarWasteland8.jpg|Wasteland WL 8 StarWasteland08.jpg|Wasteland WL 8 *'''Wasteland WL 3''': Inside, one Child of Light is standing on a little island in the lake to the right of the main building. *'''Wasteland WL 4''': After crossing the lake area, there is a Child of Light standing in an alcove to the right of the exit. *'''Wasteland WL 5''': In the Graveyard, one Child of Light is on top of a hill to the right of the big bones. It may be helpful to first fly up the side of the pipe leading into the Crab Fields and then jump down on the other side to reach the Child of Light. *'''Wasteland WL 6''': Enter the main hollow structure in the middle of the lake, the Child of Light is on the far side of it, high up on a ledge, best seen from the back of structure. One of the Dark Dragons will patrol this ledge and thus players should be cautious while recharging in the sparkle left behind. *'''Wasteland WL 7''': Another Child of Light is in a smaller pipe-like structure to the left of the main central structure. *'''Wasteland WL 8''': There is a Child of Light near the stairs leading into the exit (where white birds are flying) on the other side of the lake. A Dark Dragon will also patrol this spot. ===Crab Fields ({{#var:crab_fields}})=== There are three ways to access the Crab Fields area via the Graveyard, for two of them Spirits from the Golden Wasteland will be needed to be found in order to pass through. *First way: through a pipe on the right of the slope that leads to the Graveyard. This pipe is blocked with a Spirit Gate that requires one Ancestor Spirit from Wasteland to open. *Second way: Above the previously mentioned pipe with the Spirit Gate, there is another pipe that isn't blocked in any way. However, this pipe may be slightly difficult to reach with low wing energy. *Third way: In the Graveyard area proper, go right along the rocks past Wasteland WL 9 and look for an elevated platform made out of bricks, there should be a round pipe with a Spirit Gate on this platform. The gate needs one Ancestor Spirit from Wasteland. StarWasteland9.jpeg|Wasteland WL 9 StarWasteland09.jpeg|Wasteland WL 9 StarWasteland10.jpeg|Wasteland WL 10 StarWasteland010.jpg|Wasteland WL 10 StarWasteland11.jpeg|Wasteland WL 11 StarWasteland011.jpg|Wasteland WL 11 *'''Wasteland WL 9''': Find the place where there is a tear in the hull of the ship that is spilling lots of golden jars, the Child of Light is standing on top of them, inside the ship. *'''Wasteland WL 10''': Fly to the very far end of the area along the rock wall leading into the Graveyard area, towards a tower. The Child of Light is standing opposite the tower high up in a cave in the cliff face. This Child of Light is not easy to reach without a friend (or a high cape level), but it might help to climb the tower and fly from there. Some players also choose to enter from the Graveyard area's second entrance (without the Spirit Gate), as it provides higher starting ground. *'''Wasteland WL 11''': Go along the rock wall beyond the shipwreck in the direction of the Wasteland Battlefield. The Child of Light is standing beyond the utmost corner of the wall, by the sea and in the vicinity of some pipes. It may be difficult to spot far away, as it is slightly obscured by rocks and pipes. ===The Battlefield ({{#var:the_battlefield}})=== The entrance to the Wasteland Battlefield is located at the very end of the Graveyard, between two large towers and a staircase that leads to a windy tunnel, where Wasteland WL 8 is located. When entering from the Crab Fields, go towards the big bundle of pipes behind the wreck and climb over the top to reach the Battlefield. The Battlefield does not have any Dark Dragons patrolling initially, but after activating the gate of the Temple (or get close enough when it has already been lit by someone else), three Dark Dragons will be released and roam the area. Thus it is recommended not to go anywhere near the gate before finishing to explore the area. StarWasteland12.jpg|Wasteland WL 12 StarWasteland012.jpg|Wasteland WL 12 StarWasteland13.jpg|Wasteland WL 13 StarWasteland013.jpg|Wasteland WL 13 *'''Wasteland WL 12''': There are two main buildings: the far away ending Temple that is still intact and a ruined fortress/temple surrounded by a moat. Climb the walls of the ruined fortress and the Child of Light is standing to the left (looking from the inside of the building) of the main tower. The easiest way up is to climb the right hand wall that forms steps. *'''Wasteland WL 13''': In front of the main Temple there are several towers. The Child of Light is behind the tower to the right of the main gate. ===Temple of the Wasteland ({{#var:wasteland_temple}})=== StarWasteland14.jpg|Wasteland WL 14 StarWasteland014.jpg|Wasteland WL 14 '''Wasteland WL 14''': The Child of Light is in the center of the Temple to the right of the polluted water. ===Forgotten Ark ({{#var:forgotten_ark}})===
Forgotten ark star 1.jpg|Wasteland WL 15 Forgotten ark star 2.jpg|Wasteland WL 16 *'''Wasteland WL 15''': The Child of Light on the right bow of the Ark. *'''Wasteland WL 16''': The Child of Light is inside a far back cave near where the Red Light can be found.
===Treasure Reef ({{#var:treasure_reef}})===
Season of Abyss - Winglight 1.jpg|Wasteland WL 17 Season of Abyss - Winglight2.jpg|Wasteland WL 18 *'''Wasteland WL 17''': The Child of Light is located on top of the tallest tower on the left when entering Treasure Reef. *'''Wasteland WL 18''': The Child of Light is located by diving down the water where small hexagonal ruins can be found near the middle of Treasure Reef. Dive and swim down the stairs. Descend further down towards the bubbles that can restore oxygen. Then, open the small closed secret gate located behind the staircase. The Child of Light will be in a small room behind several big clams.
==[[Vault of Knowledge]] ({{#var:vault}})== ===Vault Rest ({{#var:vault_rest}})=== StarVault1.jpg|Vault WL 1 StarVault01.jpg|Vault WL 1 *'''Vault WL 1''': Upon entering the Vault of Knowledge, go up the stairs and up the ladder to the left. The Child of Light located at the top. ===Lower Vault ({{#var:lower_vault}})=== StarVault2.jpg|Vault WL 2 StarVault02.jpg|Vault WL 2 *'''Vault WL 2''': Look up to find a gazebo on a floating platform. The Child of Light is on the roof. Utilize the orange star dust to recharge the cape energy if needed. ===Upper Vault ({{#var:upper_vault}})=== StarVault3.jpg|Vault WL 3 StarVault03.jpg|Vault WL 3 Vaultnewstarfloor4.jpg|Vault WL 4 vault star 6b.jpeg|Vault WL 4 StarVault4.jpeg|Vault WL 5 StarVault04.jpg|Vault WL 5 *'''Vault WL 3''': Use the lift to the next floor with cosmic mantas flying around. Find the Child of Light in a round building with a stone roof floating high up on a platform. Use smaller platforms and steps to reach. *'''Vault WL 4''': It's positioned on the highest platform accessible on the Upper Vault, directly above the bones which correspond to the Memory Call Spirit. The platform is left over from the Season of Lightseekers. This Child of Light was added in Patch 0.9.2. *'''Vault WL 5''': Light all the lanterns the [[Spirit Mantas]] carry to activate the elevator. The elevator will stop next to a skeleton where the Child of Light is hidden behind one of its bones. ===Temple of the Vault ({{#var:vault_temple}})=== StarVault5.jpeg|Vault WL 6 StarVault05.jpg|Vault WL 6 *'''Vault WL 6''': Ride a [[Mantas#Spirit Mantas | Spirit Manta]] to reach the summit. The Child of Light stands between the stairs to the shrine at the very top. ===Vault Archive ({{#var:vault_archive}})===
The door is on the right side of the entrance to the Vault of Knowledge, opposite to the location of Vault WL 1, and requires two players to unlock, then a Spirit Gate beyond the door requires at least one Ancestor Spirit from the Vault to be found. vaultstar2.jpg|Vault WL 7 vaultstar3far.jpg|Vault WL 8 (ladder) vaultstar3.jpg|Vault WL 8 *'''Vault WL 7''': After descending through two holes into an area filled with crabs, take a left at the first fork. The Child of Light is standing hidden behind two large jars. *'''Vault WL 8''': Continue towards the right in the above mentioned fork. In the room with a large ladder, there is a hole in the ceiling. Upon ascending through this hole, the Child of Light can be found standing on a ledge.
===Starlight Desert ({{#var:starlight_desert}})===
The entrance is a meditation circle inside the [[Hall of Stories]], that can accessed either on the left side of the right side of the entrance to the Vault of Knowledge, right before the location of Vault WL 1 (with a Spirit Gate requiring one Ancestor Spirit from Vault), or through the [[Sky Cinema]] in [[Aviary Village]]. Alternatively, this area can be accessed via the third cloud tunnel in the [[Wind Paths]]. SOTLP-Winglight-1.jpg|Vault WL 9 SOTLP-Winglight-2.jpg|Vault WL 10 SOTLP-Winglight-3.jpg|Vault WL 11 *'''Vault WL 9''': On top of the giant jar to the right of the tunnel entrance towards the peak of Eye of Eden. *'''Vault WL 10''': On top of the giant lamp tower directly across from Vault WL 9 on the giant jar. *'''Vault WL 11''': Inside the lower chamber of the king's floating island throne.
===Repository of Refuge ({{#var:repository}})===
The door is on the left side of the Lower Vault floor and there is a Spirit Gate that requires one Ancestor Spirit from Vault. SOR-Winglight-1.png|Vault WL 12 SOR-Winglight-2.png|Vault WL 12 *'''Vault WL 12''': Fly above the wall where the Spirit of the [[Pleading Child]] rests and descend to the lit floor below, or enter the hole in the wall behind [[Remembrance Guide]] and once outside, fly to the ledge on the left. The Child of Light will be standing behind bars inside the wall and it can be accessed both from the outside or by entering a hole in the wall above the bars.
===Crescent Oasis ({{#var:crescent_oasis}})===
The entrance is a meditation circle inside the [[Hall of Stories]], marked by the icon of a [[Season of the Nine-Colored Deer|Deer]], that can accessed either on the left side of the right side of the entrance to the Vault of Knowledge, right before the location of Vault WL 1 (with a Spirit Gate requiring one Ancestor Spirit from Vault), or through the [[Sky Cinema]] in [[Aviary Village]]. Crescent-Oasis-WL1.jpg|Vault WL 13 Crescent-Oasis-WL2.jpg|Vault WL 14 Crescent-Oasis-WL3.jpg|Vault WL 15 *'''Vault WL 13''': Located behind the rock shelf with the Mural depicting the Season's story, near the Crescent Lake. *'''Vault WL 14''': Located within the village and on top of the [[Feudal Lord]]'s Royal Palace, behind its spiked peak. *'''Vault WL 15''': Located under the golden tree in the Hidden Glade, accessed through a tunnel in the clouds near where Vault WL 13 is found. ''Note that players must complete the [[Season of the Nine-Colored Deer#Quest #5|5th Quest]] to unlock access to this Child of Light.''
===Moominvalley ({{#var:moominvalley}})===
The entrance is a meditation circle inside the [[Hall of Stories]], that can accessed either on the left side of the right side of the entrance to the Vault of Knowledge, right before the location of Vault WL 1 (with a Spirit Gate requiring one Ancestor Spirit from Vault), or through the [[Sky Cinema]] in [[Aviary Village]]. Season-of-Moomin-Winged-Light.jpg|Vault WL 16 (Far) Season-of-Moomin-Winged-Light-1.jpg|Vault WL 16 *'''Vault WL 16''': Located inside the distant gazebo, beyond the series of platforms behind the central forested area. ''Note that players must complete the [[Season of Moomin#Spirit Memory Quests|final Quest]] to unlock access to this Child of Light.''
==[[Eye of Eden]] ({{#var:eden}})== A number of Winged Light are present in the Eye of Eden, one in the Gate of Eden Area, and the rest just before and inside the tunnel of lights at the end of the Path of Eden. These will help the player recover from any Winged Light lost traversing through Eden. They are available to collect before the "point of no return" i.e. before players are locked into completing Eden. Unlike all other Children of Light in the Realms, the ones in Eye of Eden are sitting on the ground or looking at it. ===Gate of Eden ({{#var:gate_of_eden}})=== StarEden1.jpg|Eden WL 1 (Far) StarEden01.jpg|Eden WL 1 *'''Eden WL 1''': Inside the room before entering the second section of Eden. ===Path of Eden ({{#var:path_of_eden}})=== StarEden2.jpg|Eden WL 2 (Far) StarEden02.jpg|Eden WL 2 StarEden3.jpeg|Eden WL 3 (Far) StarEden3.jpg|Eden WL 3 StarEden04.jpg|Eden WL 4 (Far) StarEden4.jpg|Eden WL 4 StarEden5.jpg|Eden WL 5 (Far) StarEden05.jpg|Eden WL 5 StarEden6.jpg|Eden WL 6 (Far) StarEden06.jpg|Eden WL 6 StarEden7.jpg|Eden WL 7 (Far) StarEden07.jpg|Eden WL 7 StarEden08.jpg|Eden WL 8 (Far) StarEden8.jpg|Eden WL 8 StarEden9.jpg|Eden WL 9 (Far) StarEden09.jpg|Eden WL 9 StarEden10.jpg|Eden WL 10 (Far) StarEden010.jpg|Eden WL 10 *'''Eden WL 2''': Before the hallway's entrance, towards the left, behind a stone. *'''Eden WL 3''': Sitting at the entrance of the hallway before the "point of no return" *'''Eden WL 4-10''': Scattered throughout the hallway. ==The Passage ({{Game Stat|wings_orbit}})== Despite not showing on the map, one additional Winged Light can be collected in the Passage during the transition to the credits. To collect it, players must go through the gateway to rebirth and wait for the credits until the skip button appears. ==Shard Memories (6)== These locations can be accessed after completing [[Shard_Eruptions#Strong_Eruptions | Strong Shard Eruptions]]. After completing the [[Season_of_Shattering#Spirit_Memory_Quests | Season of Shattering Quests]], one random location will be accessible at a time. SoShattering-Winged-Light-Jellyfish-Void.jpg|Shard Memory WL 1 in Jellyfish Void SOShattering-Winged-light-crab-void.jpg|Shard Memory WL 2 in Crab Void SOShattering-Winged-light-Manta-void.jpg|Shard Memory WL 3 in Manta Void SOShattering-Winged-Light-in-Dark-Dragon-Void.jpg|Shard Memory WL 4 in Dark Dragon Void SOShattering-Winged-Light-whale-void.jpg|Shard Memory WL 5 in Whale Void SoShattering-Winged-Light-elders-void.jpg|Shard Memory WL 6 in Elders Void *'''Shard Memory WL 1''': In the '''Jellyfish''' void after completing the [[Season of Shattering#Quest #1|first Quest]]. *'''Shard Memory WL 2''': In the '''Crabs and flying Darkness''' void after completing the [[Season of Shattering#Quest #2|second Quest]]. *'''Shard Memory WL 3''': In the '''Mantas''' void after completing the [[Season of Shattering#Quest #3|third Quest]]. *'''Shard Memory WL 4''': In the '''Dark Dragon''' void after completing the [[Season of Shattering#Quest #4|fourth Quest]]. *'''Shard Memory WL 5''': In the '''Whales''' void after completing the [[Season of Shattering#Quest #5|fifth Quest]]. *'''Shard Memory WL 6''': In the '''Elders''' void after completing the [[Season of Shattering#Quest #6|sixth Quest]]. ==References== [[pt-br:Filhos da Luz]] [[de:Kinder des Lichts]] [[fr:Enfants de la Lumière]] [[Category:Collectibles]] [[Category:Winged Light]] [[Category:Advanced Guides]] [[Category:Voids]]
